step01/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release property to target Java 21.
step01/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17 bytecode, failing to utilize Java 21 features and potentially causing runtime incompatibilities if Java 21-specific APIs are used.

step01/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the maven-compiler-plugin version to a snapshot compatible with Java 21.
step01/pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of the compiler plugin may not fully support or correctly handle Java 21 language features or bytecode generation.

step01/pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the release configuration in the maven-compiler-plugin to 21.
step01/pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the compiler plugin explicitly targets Java 21, overriding any potential defaults or property misconfigurations.
